caption: In a spacious, well-lit indoor hall featuring recessed ceiling lighting and elegant chandeliers, several people practice martial arts. The practitioners are dressed in traditional uniforms, primarily in blue or white. In the foreground, a man in a white outfit performs a series of dynamic movements, shifting from a deep lunging stance to an overhead striking motion with a wooden staff. Other individuals in blue and purple uniforms are scattered throughout the room, some holding similar wooden staffs and mirroring choreographed movements. As the sequence progresses, the man in white moves through a fluid set of strikes and blocks, transitioning his weight and position across the blue floor. The background shows other practitioners and a few spectators observing the session. There are no visible logos or on-screen text throughout the scene.
